nasb.text: He said to her, “Please give me a little water to drink, for I am thirsty.” So she opened a bottle of milk and gave him a drink; then she covered him.

esv.text: And he said to her, “Please give me a little water to drink, for I am thirsty.” So she opened a skin of milk and gave him a drink and covered him.

cnv.text: 西西拉對雅億說：“請給我一點水喝，因為我渴了。”雅億就打開盛奶的皮袋，給他喝了，再把他蓋著。

ccb.text: 西西拉说：“我口渴，请给我一点水吧。”雅亿打开皮袋给他奶喝，然后又给他盖上毯子。
